title: French Flaky Galette Bread
description: A delicious homemade bread with a delicate flaky crust and a soft interior. Perfect for serving with your favorite soups or salads.
instructions: 2. Roll out the flaky pastry dough to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
3. In a small bowl, mix the kissed butter and salt (if using).
4. Spread the butter mixture evenly over the dough, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
5. Fold the edges of the dough over the filling, pressing gently to seal.
6. Place the galette on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
7. Brush the egg wash over the dough.
8. Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown.
9. Remove the galette from the oven and let it cool on a wire rack for 10 minutes.
10. Slice the galette into thick slices and serve warm.
